The '''TL-4''' was a model of [[tailor droid]]. It was a new model as of [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]. [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Tolum Harous]] owned a TL-4 which kept his labcoats freshly pressed<ref name="AIR" />
